security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.
An attacker can craft a vote message that appears legitimate to the contract

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be manipulated en route to the contract.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Tampering with votes could be done via network interception or malicious relays.

assumptions: Network traffic may be intercepted or modified.
The governance contract does not validate vote data integrity.
The actor has the ability to intercept or modify network communications

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity checks (e.g., hashing) and secure communication channels (e.g., TLS).

description: An attacker might alter the vote data before it reaches the contract, changing the outcome of the governance decision.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be submitted anonymously without accountability.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Lack of accountability can lead to manipulation and denial of responsibility.

assumptions: The voting system does not require user authentication or identification.
The actor can cast votes anonymously without leaving an audit trail

mitigation.strategy: Implement secure authentication and logging mechanisms to track voting activity.

description: An attacker may cast votes anonymously and deny responsibility for their actions.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote information may be leaked during transmission or storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Sensitive vote data may be exposed to unauthorized parties.

assumptions: Vote data is transmitted over insecure channels.
Vote data is stored insecurely in the contract.
The actor can eavesdrop on network traffic or access the contract's storage

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote data during transmission and storage. Use a secure database for storing vote information.

description: An attacker could gain access to sensitive vote information during transmission or from the contract's storage.
